texto: Fuck, babe,” Chocolate Eyes said, stepping forward. He grabbed her arm and hauled her to her feet off the tiled floor. “You look like crap...worse, actually.” He wiped her tears with the calloused pad of his thumb. “You want to get out of this pisshole or not?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Cindy Paterson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Fuck, babe,” Chocolate Eyes said, stepping forward. He grabbed her arm and hauled her to her feet…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, romance, chocolate pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
